description: Pre-loaded RVT demos (VW1-22) for the rvt-view browser viewer. Each entry points at a file the static-site deploy bundles alongside the viewer, plus enough metadata for a landing-page catalog.
attribution: phi-ag/rvt — 11-release sample family (rac_basic_sample_family.rfa across Revit 2016-2026). Redistribution confirmed in the upstream repo's LICENSE.

demos.name: RAC Basic Sample Family (2024)
demos.description: Family-scale sample — the canonical reference across every rvt-rs test.

demos.name: RAC Basic Sample Family (2026)
demos.description: Same family upgraded through every Revit release — shows cross-version reading.

demos.name: Synthetic IFC project fixture
demos.description: Hand-built IFC4 fixture — shows what the exporter produces without a Revit input.

demos.name: Synthetic structural fixture
demos.description: Columns + beams + structural framing — exercises the IfcMember routing + RepresentationMap paths.

schema_note: Frontend loader reads this file at build time, copies every entry to the site's /demos/ path, and renders a gallery with thumbnails on the landing page. The `element_count_hint` is a display value — the actual viewer runs its own element enumeration on load.
privacy_note: Every demo listed here has redistribution rights confirmed. Adding a new demo requires either (a) the contributor holds copyright and chooses to open-source it, or (b) the file is already under an open license allowing redistribution (e.g. phi-ag/rvt's MIT / sample-content clause). See docs/viewer-privacy-posture.md (VW1-21) for the broader client-side-only posture.
